title: Replication package: Level Breaks and Finite-Sample GLS Detrending
description: Replication code and public data for the paper 'Level Breaks and Finite-Sample GLS Detrending: The Point-Optimal Unit Root Test and the Purchasing Power Parity Puzzle'. One numerical kernel (mlb_core.py) with a pure-Python fallback (mlb_kernel.py), one driver per section (3-4 calibration, 5 robustness, 6 PPP application), a stand-alone tool to apply the Model LB test to any series (run_model_lb.py), and a Pesaran cross-sectional-dependence diagnostic (pesaran_cd.py).
